variants.name: with-icon
variants.description: The select button includes a 16px icon to the left of the value or placeholder text. Use when the field type benefits from a visual icon cue.

variants.name: without-icon
variants.description: The select button shows only the text and the chevron icon. Default usage in most form contexts.

sizes.name: default
sizes.description: Single confirmed size. The select button height is always 44px.

states.name: placeholder
states.description: No value has been selected. Placeholder text is displayed in --text/placeholder (muted color).

states.name: preselected
states.description: A value has been selected. Value text is displayed in --button/secondary/text-default (full contrast body color).

anatomyParts.name: Label
anatomyParts.description: Short text label above the select button. Identifies the field. Styled with Manrope Medium 14px.

anatomyParts.name: SelectButton
anatomyParts.description: Pill-shaped tap target. Height 44px, full-radius. Contains left icon (optional), value/placeholder text, and chevron icon. Can be used independently.

anatomyParts.name: LeftIcon
anatomyParts.description: Contextual icon inside the select button, left-aligned. Decorative in most cases. The specific icon is provided by the consumer.

anatomyParts.name: ValueText
anatomyParts.description: Displays the selected value (preselected state) or a placeholder hint (placeholder state). Manrope SemiBold 14px.

anatomyParts.name: ChevronIcon
anatomyParts.description: Dropdown chevron always present on the right side of the select button. Decorative — indicates expandability.

anatomyParts.name: Annotation
anatomyParts.description: Helper text row below the select button. Prefixed with a 16px info icon. Manrope Medium 14px in --text/placeholder color.

subComponents.name: select_button
subComponents.description: The pill-shaped interactive trigger. Supports optional left icon, value or placeholder text, and chevron. Can be used independently outside of Dropdown Input.

subComponents.name: anotation
subComponents.description: The helper text element with a leading info icon. Can be used independently.

props.name: annotation
props.description: Show or hide the annotation row

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: Show or hide the left icon in the select button

props.name: leftIconElement
props.description: Icon element rendered inside the select button (16px)

props.name: value
props.description: Selected value. When present, renders the preselected state.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is selected

props.name: onPress
props.description: Callback fired on tap. Use to open the associated picker or overlay.

notes: The component is a trigger only. It does not open or manage any picker or overlay.
The specific icon used as leftIconElement is context-dependent and provided by the consumer.
Token values differ between light and dark surfaces. See dropdown-input.tokens.json for both values.
